title: Xgarlicky Velvety Asian-Chive-Buchu Xshepherds-Pie
description: A realistic and savory recipe for a shepherds-pie variation featuring asian-chive-buchu with a long-fermentation dough, garlic, and jain-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Mix long-fermentation dough with asian-chive-buchu, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Chop garlic finely and mix it into the dough mixture evenly.
Roll out dough into thin sheets on a floured surface, cut circles about 15cm in diameter.
Place one circle of dough onto a greased pie dish. Spread half the cheese over the dough, then place another layer of dough on top to form the lid.
Fill the center with the garlic-chive-buchu mixture, then cover with the second dough layer and press down gently to seal.
Bake for 25 minutes until golden brown.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
